anchor_model.name: run_level_anomaly_anchor_with_dynamic_graph_challengers
anchor_model.purpose: run-held-out anomaly baseline challenged by learned-reliability dynamic LLM/graph evidence
anchor_model.implementation_status: recovered evidence reports main 0.8343 and learned reliability route 0.8532; smoke fallback uses ExtraTrees

candidate_evidence_models.name: normal_residual_evidence_head
candidate_evidence_models.family: ExtraTrees on |scaled feature - normal center| plus missingness mask
candidate_evidence_models.role: detect deviations from normal process state

candidate_evidence_models.name: mechanism_edge_feature_head
candidate_evidence_models.family: knowledge graph edge deltas/ratios generated from admitted feature-feature edges
candidate_evidence_models.role: convert candidate mechanism graph into falsifiable features

candidate_evidence_models.name: temporal_sequence_candidate
candidate_evidence_models.family: MSFG-TCN or temporal context windows over run_id/sample_index

router.name: UGMC_selective_logit_correction
router.fallback: anchor prediction when candidate evidence is unsafe

safety_checks: report main anchor and candidate-routed metrics separately
retain class id mapping for non-contiguous public labels
store graph admission policy next to every ready dataset
